description: Create a methodology content slide with a two-column layout: regional percentage callouts on the left and survey methodology text with two donut charts on the right.

right.body: This report draws upon the perspectives from 612 leaders across the financial services sector. Survey respondents represented organizations with annual revenues above US$1 billion and included a diverse group of technology leaders, such as Chief Digital Officers, CIOs, CTOs, CISOs, Chief AI Officers, and others.

items.label: were board members or members of the C-suite
reported revenues in excess of US$10 billion
